## Meeting Purpose

[Train team on new Atlas platform replacing AirOps for content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas (atlas.growthx.ai) is the new platform replacing AirOps, with similar core functionality but a new UI and expanded capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Accounts and data migrated from AirOps; some minor bugs and performance issues being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Key new features: configurable pipelines, improved artifacts management, and upcoming rich text editor](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Team should test Atlas, report issues via Linear tickets, and expect rapid improvements this week](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

## Topics

### Platform Overview and Access

  - [Access via atlas.growthx.ai using growthx.ai or growthx.labs email](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Accounts migrated from AirOps, organized into workspaces and projects](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [New UI with dashboard (features coming soon), context artifacts, and pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Context Artifacts

  - [Replaces AI context, company context, personas from AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Editable with version history (rich text editor coming soon)](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Crucial for output quality; Marcel reviewing/improving all accounts](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Pipelines

  - [Replace AirOps grids; configurable multi-step workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Common types: assignments, article generation, refresher](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Can run entire pipeline or step-by-step manually](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Inputs/outputs customizable per step; all context accessible](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Key Pipeline Types

  - [Assignments: Single-step for content briefs](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Article Generation: Multi-step (brief, research, outline, draft, fact-check, style, internal linking)](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Refresher: Updates existing content with new data/research](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

### User Interface and Workflow

  - [Grid view for managing multiple items](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Timeline view for individual item progress and editing](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Ability to archive/delete rows for organization](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
  - [Inspect feature for detailed execution info and troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Performance and Known Issues

  - [Some slowness due to rate limiting from Entropic](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Rich text editor coming soon to improve editing experience](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Pagination and sorting improvements planned](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Customization and Flexibility

  - [Pipelines highly configurable via JSON-like structure](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3052.0)
  - [Can add/modify steps, inputs, outputs as needed](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3052.0)
  - [Team working on remaining client-specific customizations](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3463.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to test Atlas and report issues via Linear tickets](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)
  - [Engineering team focused on bug fixes and performance improvements this week](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3675.0)
  - [Follow-up message with detailed usage guides coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3550.0)
  - [Remaining client-specific customizations to be completed (e.g., Adventurous Group, Zuplo)](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)
  - [Consider adding option to run pipeline to specific step](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=3305.0)
  - [Implement rich text editor and improve UI/UX based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/1sFQvTPaRg6sqxyKG-xJhh-oB41apgJ1?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
